message:
feat(ftui-web): add cache-policy objective function to glyph atlas

Introduce a CacheObjective struct and GlyphAtlasCache::objective()
method that computes a composite loss metric for cache-policy tuning:

  loss = miss_rate + 0.25 * eviction_rate + 0.5 * pressure_ratio

This gives a single scalar for comparing atlas cache configurations
and detecting regressions. The weights (CACHE_LOSS_MISS_WEIGHT,
CACHE_LOSS_EVICTION_WEIGHT, CACHE_LOSS_PRESSURE_WEIGHT) are module
constants so they can be adjusted without touching the formula.

Linked to bd-lff4p.5.6 (cache policy objective).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
